checks.note: RATCHETED 2026-06-16: FastEndpoints evidence now drives VerticalSlices (was iteration-4 MinimalApi misdetect)

this repo uses the martinothamar 'Mediator' source-gen library (Mediator.Abstractions), NOT the 'MediatR' package — the package-keyed signal will not fire. Handlers ARE detected as MediatRHandlerDetection (shared IRequestHandler interface). Revisit: teach DependencyExtractor the Mediator package, or rename the signal.
FastEndpoints routes set in Configure() via Get("/x") are not captured — entries render <dynamic>. Real gap.
